parameters.content:
## Smart Content Categorizer
Task:
1. Use a Webhook trigger to receive an array of short article
submissions. The webhook will be triggered from a HTTP
node that will make manual POST requests (you can place
the HTTP node in the same workflow)
2. Split the articles into separate items
3. Use Text Classifier to categorise articles into: Technology,
Business, Health, Entertainment, Sports
4. Use the Edit node to add “category” and “timestamp” fields
to each article
5. If the article can not be categorised (f.e. It is not an article
but spam message)- output it in “Other” branch and use
the Stop and Error node to cut the execution
6. Merge all classified articles into one single statistic
Bonus:
7. Set up an Error workflow that will handle the error trigger by
getting the article text and
8. Sending it to a Slack/Telegram/Email (by choice)
